info.title: NovaRewards API
info.description: REST API for the Nova Rewards blockchain loyalty platform. All protected endpoints require a Bearer JWT obtained from `POST /auth/login`. Merchant endpoints require an `x-api-key` header instead.

merchantApiKey.name: x-api-key
merchantApiKey.description: Merchant API key returned on registration (shown once).

get.summary: Get aggregate platform statistics
Paginated user list, searchable by email or name
List campaigns for the authenticated merchant
List campaigns for a given merchant ID
List paginated contract events
Get a specific contract event by ID
List active drops the authenticated user qualifies for

post.summary: Claim a drop for the authenticated user

proof.description: Merkle proof (required when drop has a merkle_root)

get.summary: List paginated email logs
Get a specific email log by ID
Basic health check
get.description: Returns a simple status indicating the server is running

get.summary: Detailed health check
get.description: Comprehensive health check including database, cache, external services, disk, and memory

get.summary: Get top users by earned points

post.description: Returns the merchant record plus a one-time plain-text API key. Store it securely — it is never shown again.

400.description: Validation error or missing idempotency key.

409.description: Out of stock, insufficient points, or reward inactive.

get.summary: List redemption history for the authenticated user
Get a single redemption by ID

post.summary: Distribute NOVA tokens to a customer wallet

403.description: Campaign does not belong to this merchant.

get.summary: Full-text search across rewards, campaigns, and users
Autocomplete suggestions

post.summary: Record a click-through on a search result
Verify and record a Stellar transaction
post.description: Verifies the transaction exists on Horizon then persists it in the database.

400.description: Validation error or transaction not found on Stellar.

get.summary: Get total NOVA distributed and redeemed for the authenticated merchant
Get NOVA transaction history for a wallet
get.description: Queries Horizon first; falls back to PostgreSQL if Horizon is unavailable.

get.summary: Paginated transaction history for a user

post.summary: Check whether a wallet has an active NOVA trustline
Build an unsigned changeTrust XDR for the user to sign with Freighter
Create a new user with optional referral tracking

get.summary: Get current point balance for a wallet address
Get user's on-chain token balance
get.description: Reads the user's linked Stellar public key and returns token balance from Horizon/Soroban.

404.description: User not found or no linked Stellar public key.

get.summary: Get user profile (public or private depending on ownership)

delete.summary: Soft-delete and anonymise a user account

get.summary: Get referral statistics for a user
